arabic: يُعِيدُ الْمُسَافِرُ الْمُتَأَمِّلُ تَشْكِيلَ رُؤْيَتِهِ لِلْعَالَمِ حِينَ يَنْغَمِسُ فِي ثَقَافَاتٍ مُغَايِرَةٍ وَيَتَحَدَّى افْتِرَاضَاتِهِ الْمُسْبَقَةَ.
translation: Kontemplativni putnik preoblikuje svoju viziju svijeta kada se uroni u drugačije kulture i propita vlastite pretpostavke.
translationEn: The contemplative traveller reshapes their worldview when they immerse themselves in different cultures and challenge their preconceived assumptions.
